announcement: Thanks for visiting PhiladelphiaWorkshop! All items handmade with care.
digital_sale_message: Thank you for supporting Campbell Events — your order confirmation and details are attached.
sale_message: Thank you for supporting a small Philadelphia workshop! Your order ships within 1–3 business days. Every piece is handmade, so slight variations in grain and finish are part of the charm. Reach out anytime if you have questions!
title: Handmade in Philadelphia
vacation_message: Campbell Events is on-site for a wedding this weekend; orders resume Monday.
